message:
fix(itertools): implement Zig 0.15 ArrayList API and proper iteration

- Update itertools functions to use `std.ArrayList(T){}` initialization
  instead of deprecated `.init(allocator)` pattern for Zig 0.15
- Add type inference for itertools functions (repeat, chain, cycle, etc.)
  returning `.deque` type (mapped to std.ArrayList(i64))
- Fix for-loop iteration over deque types by adding `.items` accessor
- Register loop variable as i64 type when iterating over deque
- Add io.zig and hashlib.zig to compiler runtime file copy list

files.patch:
